title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited:
Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited!
